title: Katty Gollagher (The Rocky Road To Dublin)
content:
The hill is bare: I only find
            The grass, the sky, and one small tree
        Tossing wildly on the wind;
            And that is all there is to see:
        A tree, a hill, a wind, a sky
        Where nothing ever passes by.
meaning:
James Stephens's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Katty Gollagher (The Rocky Road To Dublin)"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
